title: Lightning Flash
description: Mobs flash white when struck by lightning
body:
> **NOTE:** _This mod is packaged as part of [Great Big World](https://modrinth.com/mod/great-big-world) and was made a standalone mod so that players can enjoy it separately. Do not download both with the intent of using them together._

# Lightning Flash
A simple mod that makes mobs flash white when struck by lightning.

It's a nice visual change, however it won't be noticeable on mobs with low health since they just die.

![Lightning Flash](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3038f59eea96127c230d10b65d0674a18a278671.png)

> _This mod is free to use in modpacks with credit._
